name: Lemon Herbed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons vegetable or olive oil, up to 4 tablespoons
2 teaspoons chopped fresh oregano OR 1 teaspoon dry oregano
1 teaspoon chopped fresh basil OR 1/2 teaspoon dry basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a 4- or 6-quart Presto pressure cooker.
3. Saute onion and garlic until tender; remove.
4. Brown chicken a few pieces at a time; set aside.
5. Return all chicken to the pressure cooker with onion and garlic.
6. Add remaining ingredients except black olives, flour, and cold water.
7. Close pressure cooker cover securely.
8. Place pressure regulator on vent pipe.
9. Cook for 8 minutes at 15 pounds pressure, with regulator rocking slowly.
10. Cool pressure cooker immediately.
11. Remove chicken to a warm dish.
12. Add olives to liquid and heat.
13. Blend together flour and cold water; add to hot broth.
14. Cook and stir liquid until thickened.
15. Pour sauce over chicken.
Makes 4 to 6 servings. If desired, do not thicken sauce and prepare the Greek pasta (Orzo) in the remaining liquid.
